description: Extract a referentially consistent data subset from the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) for testing purposes. Create a new SQLite database file named 'chinook_brazil_test.db' at '/home/ga/Documents/databases/' containing only data related to customers from Brazil. The subset must include the following 9 tables with schemas matching the original: customers, employees, invoices, invoice_items, tracks, albums, artists, genres, and media_types. Maintain referential integrity by including only Brazilian customers, their invoices, their invoice_items, the tracks referenced by those items, the associated metadata (albums, artists, genres, media_types), and the employees serving as their support representatives. Save the SQL extraction script (DDL and INSERTs) to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/brazil_subset_extraction.sql'.
